revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 16 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 16 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月16日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[崇神天皇]]12年（[[紀元前86年]]_月_日） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * [[正暦]]2年（[[991年]]_月_日） - [[一条天皇]]が皇太后・[[東三条院詮子|詮子]]に東三条院の号を宣下。初の女院号 * [[応徳]]3年（[[1086年]]_月_日） - [[藤原通俊]]が『[[後拾遺和歌集]]』を撰進
== 誕生日 == * [[寛政]]5年（[[1793年]][[10月20日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（+ [[1841年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[天和 (元号)|天和]]2年（[[1682年]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月15日 (旧暦)|9月15日]] 翌日[[9月17日 (旧暦)|9月17日]] - 前月[[8月16日 (旧暦)|8月16日]] 翌月[[10月16日 (旧暦)|10月16日]] *新暦[[9月16日]]
{{msg:stub}}

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月16日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。

== 忌日 == * [[天和 (元号)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==

{{stub}}

{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月16日'''は、[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]]である。
== できごと == * [[崇神天皇]]12年（[[ユリウス暦]][[紀元前86年]][[10月12日]]） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * [[正暦]]2年（ユリウス暦[[991年]][[10月26日]]） - [[一条天皇]]が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]]に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1086年]][[10月26日]]） - [[藤原通俊]]が『[[後拾遺和歌集]]』を撰進
== 誕生日 == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1779年]][[10月25日]]） - [[市河米庵]]、[[書家]]（+ [[1858年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[10月20日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（+ [[1841年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[10月19日]]） - [[細川斉護]]、[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1860年]]） * [[安政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[10月26日]]） - [[小村壽太郎]]、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]]（+ [[1911年]]）

== 忌日 == * [[永正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1505年]][[10月13日]]） - [[武田信昌]]、[[武将]]（* [[1447年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619年]]） * [[宝永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1704年]][[10月14日]]） - [[島津綱貴]]、[[島津氏]]第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]]の第3代[[藩主]]（* [[1650年]]）

== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1779年]][[10月25日]]） - [[市河米庵]]、[[書家]]（+ [[1858年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[10月20日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（+ [[1841年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[10月19日]]） - [[細川斉護]]、[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1860年]]） * [[安政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[10月26日]]） - [[小村壽太郎]]、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]]（+ [[1911年]]）
== Deaths == * [[永正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1505年]][[10月13日]]） - [[武田信昌]]、[[武将]]（* [[1447年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619年]]） * [[宝永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1704年]][[10月14日]]） - [[島津綱貴]]、[[島津氏]]第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]]の第3代[[藩主]]（* [[1650年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

{{citation needed}} {{Japanese Traditional Lunar Months}} [[Category:赤口]] [[Category:not Butsumetsu]][[sn:September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[Category:not Butsumetsu]]

revision.text:
{{Lunar September}} '''September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 16'''<!--Lunar September16--> is the Nth day of 、[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[崇神天皇]]12年（[[ユリウス暦]][[紀元前86年]][[10月12日]]） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * [[正暦]]2年（ユリウス暦[[991年]][[10月26日]]） - [[一条天皇]]が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]]に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1086年]][[10月26日]]） - [[藤原通俊]]が『[[後拾遺和歌集]]』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1779年]][[10月25日]]） - [[市河米庵]]、[[書家]]（+ [[1858年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[10月20日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（+ [[1841年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[10月19日]]） - [[細川斉護]]、[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1860年]]） * [[安政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[10月26日]]） - [[小村壽太郎]]、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]]（+ [[1911年]]）
== Deaths == * [[永正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1505年]][[10月13日]]） - [[武田信昌]]、[[武将]]（* [[1447年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619年]]） * [[宝永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1704年]][[10月14日]]） - [[島津綱貴]]、[[島津氏]]第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]]の第3代[[藩主]]（* [[1650年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

{{Lunar September}} '''September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
<!--== {{Lunar September}} ''September 16'''<!--Lunar September16 is the Nth day of 、[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の16日目である。六曜は[[六曜#赤口|赤口]][[Category:赤口]]である。
--> == Events == * [[崇神天皇]]12年（[[ユリウス暦]][[紀元前86年]][[10月12日]]） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * [[正暦]]2年（ユリウス暦[[991年]][[10月26日]]） - [[一条天皇]]が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]]に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1086年]][[10月26日]]） - [[藤原通俊]]が『[[後拾遺和歌集]]』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]8年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1779年]][[10月25日]]） - [[市河米庵]]、[[書家]]（+ [[1858年]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793年]][[10月20日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（+ [[1841年]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1804年]][[10月19日]]） - [[細川斉護]]、[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1860年]]） * [[安政]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1855年]][[10月26日]]） - [[小村壽太郎]]、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]]（+ [[1911年]]）
== Deaths == * [[永正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1505年]][[10月13日]]） - [[武田信昌]]、[[武将]]（* [[1447年]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682年]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619年]]） * [[宝永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1704年]][[10月14日]]） - [[島津綱貴]]、[[島津氏]]第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]]の第3代[[藩主]]（* [[1650年]]）
== Commemorations ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]]12年（[[Julian Calendar]][[紀元前86]][[10月12日]]） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * [[正暦]]2年（ユリウス暦[[991]][[10月26日]]） - [[一条天皇]]が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]]に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1086]][[10月26日]]） - [[藤原通俊]]が『[[後拾遺和歌集]]』を撰進

== Deaths == * [[永正]]2年（ユリウス暦[[1505]][[10月13日]]） - [[武田信昌]]、[[武将]]（* [[1447]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1682]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619]]） * [[宝永]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1704]][[10月14日]]） - [[島津綱貴]]、[[島津氏]]第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]]の第3代[[藩主]]（* [[1650]]）

[[sn:September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]]12nd year（[[Julian Calendar]][[紀元前86]][[10月12日]]） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * [[正暦]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[991]][[10月26日]]） - [[一条天皇]]が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]]に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1086]][[10月26日]]） - [[藤原通俊]]が『[[後拾遺和歌集]]』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]8th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1779]][[10月25日]]） - [[市河米庵]]、[[書家]]（+ [[1858]]） * [[寛政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1793]][[10月20日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（+ [[1841]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1804]][[10月19日]]） - [[細川斉護]]、[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1860]]） * [[安政]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1855]][[10月26日]]） - [[小村壽太郎]]、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]]（+ [[1911]]）
== Deaths == * [[永正]]2nd year（ユリウス暦[[1505]][[10月13日]]） - [[武田信昌]]、[[武将]]（* [[1447]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1682]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619]]） * [[宝永]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1704]][[10月14日]]） - [[島津綱貴]]、[[島津氏]]第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]]の第3代[[藩主]]（* [[1650]]）

== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]8th year（[[Gregorian Calendar]][[1779]][[10月25日]]） - [[市河米庵]]、[[書家]]（+ [[1858]]） * [[寛政]]5th year（グレゴリオ暦[[1793]][[10月20日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（+ [[1841]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1st year（グレゴリオ暦[[1804]][[10月19日]]） - [[細川斉護]]、[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1860]]） * [[安政]]2nd year（グレゴリオ暦[[1855]][[10月26日]]） - [[小村壽太郎]]、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]]（+ [[1911]]）

[[sn:September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}}.
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]]12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]][[10月12日]]） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}}2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]][[10月26日]]） - [[一条天皇]]が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]]に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]]3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]][[10月26日]]） - [[藤原通俊]]が『[[後拾遺和歌集]]』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]]8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]][[10月25日]]） - [[市河米庵]]、[[書家]]（+ [[1858]]） * [[Kansei]]5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]][[10月20日]]） - [[渡辺崋山]]、[[蘭学者]]・画家（+ [[1841]]） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]][[10月19日]]） - [[細川斉護]]、[[熊本藩]]主（+ [[1860]]） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}}2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]][[10月26日]]） - [[小村壽太郎]]、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]]（+ [[1911]]）
== Deaths == * [[永正]]2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]][[10月13日]]） - [[武田信昌]]、[[武将]]（* [[1447]]） * [[天和 (日本)|天和]]2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]][[10月16日]]） - [[山崎闇斎]]、[[神道家]]・[[垂加神道]]を創始（* [[1619]]） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}}1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]][[10月14日]]） - [[島津綱貴]]、[[島津氏]]第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]]の第3代[[藩主]]（* [[1650]]）

== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[10月12日]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[10月26日]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[10月26日]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[10月25日]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[書家]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[10月20日]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[蘭学者]] ・画家（+ [[1841]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[10月19日]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[10月26日]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）

[[sn:September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[書家]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[蘭学者]] ・画家（+ [[1841]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[島津氏]] 第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）

[[sn:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[書家]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[蘭学者]] ・画家（+ [[1841]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[島津氏]] 第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）
== See Also ==

[[sn:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[書家]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[蘭学者]] ・画家（+ [[1841]] ） * [[文化 (元号)|文化]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[島津氏]] 第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）

[[sn:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[応徳]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[書家]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[蘭学者]] ・画家（+ [[1841]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、[[武将]] （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[島津氏]] 第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[書家]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[蘭学者]] ・画家（+ [[1841]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[島津氏]] 第20代当主、[[薩摩藩]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）

[[sn:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[Calligrapher]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・Painter（+ [[1841]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 第20代当主、[[Satsuma Domain]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ） == See Also! ==

[[sn:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[Calligrapher]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・Painter（+ [[1841]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 第20代当主、[[Satsuma Domain]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）

revision.text:
[[sn:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[Calligrapher]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・Painter（+ [[1841]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 第20代当主、[[Satsuma Domain]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 16일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] [[zh:九月十六]] [[en:draft:September 16 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[Calligrapher]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・Painter（+ [[1841]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 第20代当主、[[Satsuma Domain]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[Calligrapher]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・Painter（+ [[1841]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将}} （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 第20代当主、[[Satsuma Domain]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Pages to be translated]] to [[Category:dates to be translated]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:dates to be translated]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}} .
== Events == * [[崇神天皇]] 12nd year（[[Julian calendar]] [[紀元前86]] [[October 12]] ） - 朝廷が初の人口戸口調査を行う * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[991]] [[October 26]] ） - [[一条天皇]] が皇太后・[[藤原詮子|詮子]] に東三条院の号を宣下。初の[[女院号]] * [[Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1086]] [[October 26]] ） - [[藤原通俊]] が『[[後拾遺和歌集]] 』を撰進
== Births == * [[安永 (元号)|安永]] 8th year（[[Gregorian calendar]] [[1779]] [[October 25]] ） - [[市河米庵]] 、[[Calligrapher]] （+ [[1858]] ） * [[Kansei]] 5th year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1793]] [[October 20]] ） - [[渡辺崋山]] 、[[Rangaku Scholar]] ・Painter（+ [[1841]] ） * [[Bunka]] 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1804]] [[October 19]] ） - [[細川斉護]] 、[[熊本藩]] 主（+ [[1860]] ） * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1855]] [[October 26]] ） - [[小村壽太郎]] 、[[外務大臣 (日本)|外務大臣]] （+ [[1911]] ）
== Deaths == * [[永正]] 2nd year ([[Julian calendar]] [[1505]] [[October 13]] ） - [[武田信昌]] 、{{ill|Busho (rank)|ja|武将|12=draft}} （* [[1447]] ） * [[Tenna]] 2nd year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1682]] [[October 16]] ） - [[山崎闇斎]] 、[[神道家]] ・[[垂加神道]] を創始（* [[1619]] ） * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft}} 1st year ([[Gregorian calendar]] [[1704]] [[October 14]] ） - [[島津綱貴]] 、[[Shimazu Clan]] 第20代当主、[[Satsuma Domain]] の第3代[[藩主]] （* [[1650]] ）
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sujin|ja|崇神天皇}} 12nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|991|ja|991}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|ja|一条天皇}} conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * {{ill|Ōtoku|ja|応徳}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1086|ja|1086}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊}} compiled the anthology {{ill|Goshūi Wakashū|ja|後拾遺和歌集}}.
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1779|ja|1779}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日}}) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家}}) (died {{ill|1858|ja|1858}}). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1793|ja|1793}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日}}) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山}}, a rangaku scholar and painter (died {{ill|1841|ja|1841}}). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文政}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護}}, the head of the {{ill|Kumamoto Domain|ja|熊本藩}} (died {{ill|1860|ja|1860}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日}}) – {{ill|Komura Jutaro|ja|小村壽太郎}}, Minister of Foreign Affairs (died {{ill|1911|ja|1911}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennen|ja|天永|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1111|ja|1111}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}) – {{ill|Ōe Masafusa|ja|大江匡房}}, a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born {{ill|1041|ja|1041}}). * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1204|ja|1204}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日}}) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範}}, a military commander (武将) (born {{ill|1189|ja|1189}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚}}, a daimyō (born {{ill|1783|ja|1783}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856}} {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日}}) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|ja|国学者}}) (born {{ill|1785|ja|1785}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日}}) – {{ill|Ōmura Masujirō|ja|大村益次郎}}, a military scholar (born {{ill|1824|ja|1824}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sujin|ja|崇神天皇|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft}}） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|991|ja|991|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft}} conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|12=draft}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * {{ill|Ōtoku|ja|応徳|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1086|ja|1086|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=draft}} compiled the anthology {{ill|Goshūi Wakashū|ja|後拾遺和歌集|12=draft}}.
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1779|ja|1779|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=draft}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|12=draft}}) (died {{ill|1858|ja|1858|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1793|ja|1793|12=draft}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山|12=draft}}, a rangaku scholar and painter (died {{ill|1841|ja|1841|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文政|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|12=draft}}, the head of the {{ill|Kumamoto Domain|ja|熊本藩|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1860|ja|1860|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Komura Jutaro|ja|小村壽太郎|12=draft}}, Minister of Foreign Affairs (died {{ill|1911|ja|1911|12=draft}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennen|ja|天永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1111|ja|1111|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōe Masafusa|ja|大江匡房|12=draft}}, a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born {{ill|1041|ja|1041|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1204|ja|1204|12=draft}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=draft}}, a military commander (武将) (born {{ill|1189|ja|1189|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839|12=draft}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=draft}}, a daimyō (born {{ill|1783|ja|1783|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft}} {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=draft}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|ja|国学者|12=draft}}) (born {{ill|1785|ja|1785|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōmura Masujirō|ja|大村益次郎|12=draft}}, a military scholar (born {{ill|1824|ja|1824|12=draft}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月十六]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September|12=draft|12=draft}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=draft|12=draft}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sujin|ja|崇神天皇|12=draft}} 12nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft}}） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * {{ill|Shōryaku|ja|正暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|991|ja|991|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|ja|一条天皇|12=draft}} conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|12=draft}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|12=draft}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * {{ill|Ōtoku|ja|応徳|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1086|ja|1086|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=draft}} compiled the anthology {{ill|Goshūi Wakashū|ja|後拾遺和歌集|12=draft}}.
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=draft}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1779|ja|1779|12=draft}} {{ill|October 25|ja|10月25日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=draft}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|12=draft}}) (died {{ill|1858|ja|1858|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政|12=draft}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1793|ja|1793|12=draft}} {{ill|October 20|ja|10月20日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Watanabe Kasan|ja|渡辺崋山|12=draft}}, a rangaku scholar and painter (died {{ill|1841|ja|1841|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Bunka|ja|文政|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804|12=draft}} {{ill|October 19|ja|10月19日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|12=draft}}, the head of the {{ill|Kumamoto Domain|ja|熊本藩|12=draft}} (died {{ill|1860|ja|1860|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1855|ja|1855|12=draft}} {{ill|October 26|ja|10月26日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Komura Jutaro|ja|小村壽太郎|12=draft}}, Minister of Foreign Affairs (died {{ill|1911|ja|1911|12=draft}}).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Tennen|ja|天永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1111|ja|1111|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōe Masafusa|ja|大江匡房|12=draft}}, a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born {{ill|1041|ja|1041|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Genkyū|ja|元久|12=draft|12=draft}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1204|ja|1204|12=draft}} {{ill|November 27|ja|11月27日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=draft}}, a military commander (武将) (born {{ill|1189|ja|1189|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Tenpō|ja|天保|12=draft|12=draft}} 10th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1839|ja|1839|12=draft}} {{ill|December 10|ja|12月10日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=draft}}, a daimyō (born {{ill|1783|ja|1783|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1856|ja|1856|12=draft}} {{ill|December 2|ja|12月2日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=draft}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|ja|国学者|12=draft}}) (born {{ill|1785|ja|1785|12=draft}}). * {{ill|Meiji era|ja|明治|12=draft}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft}} {{ill|1869|ja|1869|12=draft}} {{ill|December 7|ja|12月7日|12=draft}}) – {{ill|Ōmura Masujirō|ja|大村益次郎|12=draft}}, a military scholar (born {{ill|1824|ja|1824|12=draft}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840252]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 16|qq=September 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] 12nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/86 BC|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]]） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:991|991]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Emperor Ichijō]] conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoin-gō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 女院|1=nyoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10075498}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saneko Fujiwara|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1086|1086]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29972024}} compiled the anthology [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]].
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]]) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikawa Beian|qq=|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calligrapher|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=calligrapher|WD=Q3303330}}) (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasan]], a rangaku scholar and painter (died [[:en:1841|1841]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Saigo|qq=|1=Hosokawa Narimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605913}}, the head of the [[:en:Kumamoto Domain|Kumamoto Domain]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Komura Jutarō|Komura Jutaro]], Minister of Foreign Affairs (died [[:en:1911|1911]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|qq=|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|qq=|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|qq=|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|qq=|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] 12nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/86 BC|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]]） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:991|991]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Emperor Ichijō]] conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoin-gō|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 女院|1=nyoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10075498}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saneko Fujiwara|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1086|1086]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|qq=|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29972024}} compiled the anthology [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]].
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]]) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikawa Beian|qq=|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calligrapher|qq=|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=calligrapher|WD=Q3303330}}) (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasan]], a rangaku scholar and painter (died [[:en:1841|1841]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Saigo|qq=|1=Hosokawa Narimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605913}}, the head of the [[:en:Kumamoto Domain|Kumamoto Domain]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Komura Jutarō|Komura Jutaro]], Minister of Foreign Affairs (died [[:en:1911|1911]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|qq=|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|qq=|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|qq=|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]]) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikawa Beian|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calligrapher|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=calligrapher|WD=Q3303330}}) (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasan]], a rangaku scholar and painter (died [[:en:1841|1841]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Saigo|1=Hosokawa Narimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605913}}, the head of the [[:en:Kumamoto Domain|Kumamoto Domain]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Komura Jutarō|Komura Jutaro]], Minister of Foreign Affairs (died [[:en:1911|1911]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Pages linked to by wikidata]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840252]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 16|qq=September 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] 12nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/86 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]]） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:991|991]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Emperor Ichijō]] conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoin-gō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 女院|1=nyoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10075498}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saneko Fujiwara|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1086|1086]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29972024}} compiled the anthology [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]].
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]]) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikawa Beian|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calligrapher|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=calligrapher|WD=Q3303330}}) (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasan]], a rangaku scholar and painter (died [[:en:1841|1841]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Saigo|1=Hosokawa Narimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605913}}, the head of the [[:en:Kumamoto Domain|Kumamoto Domain]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Komura Jutarō|Komura Jutaro]], Minister of Foreign Affairs (died [[:en:1911|1911]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840252]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 16|qq=September 16}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] 12nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/86 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]]） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:991|991]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Emperor Ichijō]] conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoin-gō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 女院|1=nyoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10075498}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saneko Fujiwara|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1086|1086]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29972024}} compiled the anthology [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]].
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]]) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikawa Beian|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calligrapher|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=calligrapher|WD=Q3303330}}) (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasan]], a rangaku scholar and painter (died [[:en:1841|1841]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Saigo|1=Hosokawa Narimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605913}}, the head of the [[:en:Kumamoto Domain|Kumamoto Domain]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Komura Jutarō|Komura Jutaro]], Minister of Foreign Affairs (died [[:en:1911|1911]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916|qq=}}

== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh_min_nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh_yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840252]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 16|qq=September 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] 12nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/86 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]]） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:991|991]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Emperor Ichijō]] conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoin-gō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 女院|1=nyoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10075498}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saneko Fujiwara|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1086|1086]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29972024}} compiled the anthology [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]].
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]]) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikawa Beian|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calligrapher|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=calligrapher|WD=Q3303330}}) (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasan]], a rangaku scholar and painter (died [[:en:1841|1841]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Saigo|1=Hosokawa Narimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605913}}, the head of the [[:en:Kumamoto Domain|Kumamoto Domain]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Komura Jutarō|Komura Jutaro]], Minister of Foreign Affairs (died [[:en:1911|1911]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
