<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 16 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月16日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 16일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 16 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月十六]][[zh:九月十六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840252]] Wikidata name: 16th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:12, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 16|qq=September 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * [[:en:Emperor Sujin|Emperor Sujin]] 12nd year（[[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/86 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} [[:en:October 12|October 12]]） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * [[:en:Shōryaku|Shōryaku]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:991|991]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Emperor Ichijō|Emperor Ichijō]] conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoin-gō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 女院|1=nyoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10075498}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saneko Fujiwara|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * [[:en:Ōtoku|Ōtoku]] 3rd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1086|1086]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29972024}} compiled the anthology [[:en:Goshūi Wakashū|Goshūi Wakashū]].
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1779|1779]] [[:en:October 25|October 25]]) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikawa Beian|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calligrapher|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=calligrapher|WD=Q3303330}}) (died [[:en:1858|1858]]). * [[:en:Kansei|Kansei]] 5th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1793|1793]] [[:en:October 20|October 20]]) – [[:en:Watanabe Kazan|Watanabe Kasan]], a rangaku scholar and painter (died [[:en:1841|1841]]). * [[:en:Bunsei|Bunka]] 1st year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 19|October 19]]) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Saigo|1=Hosokawa Narimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605913}}, the head of the [[:en:Kumamoto Domain|Kumamoto Domain]] (died [[:en:1860|1860]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1855|1855]] [[:en:October 26|October 26]]) – [[:en:Komura Jutarō|Komura Jutaro]], Minister of Foreign Affairs (died [[:en:1911|1911]]).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Ten'ei|Tennen]] 2nd year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1111|1111]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōe no Masafusa|Ōe Masafusa]], a kugyō, Confucian scholar, and poet (born [[:en:1041|1041]]). * [[:en:Genkyū|Genkyū]] 1st year ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1204|1204]] [[:en:November 27|November 27]]) – {{ill|Hojo Masanori|ja|北条政範|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hojo Masanori|1=Hōjō Masanori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11402108}}, a military commander (武将) (born [[:en:1189|1189]]). * [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] 10th year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1839|1839]] [[:en:December 10|December 10]]) – {{ill|Matsudaira Saiatsu|ja|松平斉厚|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Saiatsu|1=Matsudaira Nariatsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530458}}, a daimyō (born [[:en:1783|1783]]). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 3rd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1856|1856]] [[:en:December 2|December 2]]) – {{ill|Ashidai Hirokun|ja|足代弘訓|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ashidai Hirokun|1=Hironori Ajiro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q6535014}}, a kokugakuist ({{ill|Kokugakuist|1=kokugaku|2=ja|3=国学者|ja|国学者|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakuist|13=User:Immanuelle/Kokugakusha|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 国学|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q855159}}) (born [[:en:1785|1785]]). * [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 2nd year ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1869|1869]] [[:en:December 7|December 7]]) – [[:en:Ōmura Masujirō|Ōmura Masujirō]], a military scholar (born [[:en:1824|1824]]).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|15|9|17|8|16|10|9|0916|qq=}}

Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|WD=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin}} 12nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/86 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}}） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|991|en|991|WD=Q24097|lt=991}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|en|Emperor Ichijō|WD=Q449540|lt=Emperor Ichijō}} conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoin-gō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 女院|1=nyoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10075498}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saneko Fujiwara|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|WD=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1086|en|1086|WD=Q19460|lt=1086}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29972024}} compiled the anthology {{ill|Goshūi Wakashū|en|Goshūi Wakashū|WD=Q115108|lt=Goshūi Wakashū}}.
== Births == * {{ill|An'ei|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1193910}} 8th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1779|en|1779|WD=Q7714|lt=1779}} {{ill|October 25|en|October 25|WD=Q2954|lt=October 25}}) – {{ill|Ichikawa Beian|ja|市河米庵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichikawa Beian|1=Ichikawa Beian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11480613}}, a calligrapher ({{ill|Calligrapher|ja|書家|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Calligrapher|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=calligrapher|WD=Q3303330}}) (died {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}}). * {{ill|Kansei|en|Kansei|WD=Q1195131|lt=Kansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1793|en|1793|WD=Q7807|lt=1793}} {{ill|October 20|en|October 20|WD=Q2959|lt=October 20}}) – {{ill|Watanabe Kazan|en|Watanabe Kazan|WD=Q3130609|lt=Watanabe Kasan}}, a rangaku scholar and painter (died {{ill|1841|en|1841|WD=Q7622|lt=1841}}). * {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|WD=Q1327119|lt=Bunka}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|WD=Q6894|lt=1804}} {{ill|October 19|en|October 19|WD=Q2961|lt=October 19}}) – {{ill|Hosokawa Saigo|ja|細川斉護|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hosokawa Saigo|1=Hosokawa Narimori|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11605913}}, the head of the {{ill|Kumamoto Domain|en|Kumamoto Domain|WD=Q1194248|lt=Kumamoto Domain}} (died {{ill|1860|en|1860|WD=Q7691|lt=1860}}). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1855|en|1855|WD=Q7673|lt=1855}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26}}) – {{ill|Komura Jutarō|en|Komura Jutarō|WD=Q1140896|lt=Komura Jutaro}}, Minister of Foreign Affairs (died {{ill|1911|en|1911|WD=Q2076|lt=1911}}).

{{Not to be confused with|September 16|qq=September 16}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月十六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 16일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 16''' is the 16th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11635368}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|WD=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}} 12nd year（{{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|86 BC|ja|紀元前86|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/86 BC|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12|1=October 12}}） – The imperial court conducted its first nationwide population and household registration. * {{ill|Shōryaku|en|Shōryaku|WD=Q1324858|lt=Shōryaku|1=Shōryaku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|991|en|991|WD=Q24097|lt=991|1=991}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26|1=October 26}}) – {{ill|Emperor Ichijō|en|Emperor Ichijō|WD=Q449540|lt=Emperor Ichijō|1=Emperor Ichijō}} conferred the title of {{ill|Nyoin-gō|ja|女院号|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nyoin-gō|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 女院|1=nyoin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10075498}} upon the empress dowager, {{ill|Saneko Fujiwara|ja|藤原詮子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saneko Fujiwara|1=Fujiwara no Senshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11623548}}, marking the first instance of a 【female院号】. * {{ill|Ōtoku|en|Ōtoku|WD=Q264214|lt=Ōtoku|1=Ōtoku}} 3rd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1086|en|1086|WD=Q19460|lt=1086|1=1086}} {{ill|October 26|en|October 26|WD=Q2953|lt=October 26|1=October 26}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara Michitoshi|ja|藤原通俊|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fujiwara Michitoshi|1=Fujiwara no Michitoshi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q29972024}} compiled the anthology {{ill|Goshūi Wakashū|en|Goshūi Wakashū|WD=Q115108|lt=Goshūi Wakashū|1=Goshūi Wakashū}}.
